side_effects.description: Burning sensation during injection, soreness lasting hours to full day after injection, bruises and lumps under skin lasting up to 5 days

protocol_notes: Taking KLOW (likely GHK-Cu product), obtained from pharmacy, pre-reconstituted. Injecting in thigh due to habit from previous GLP shot. Partner has no reaction with stomach injections. User started slowly injecting and taking zinc to mitigate discomfort with some improvement but occasional persistent stinging.
